metadata.description: Handcrafted plugins for serious AI-assisted development — autonomous agents, context compression, and tools that get out of your way.

plugins.name: epic
plugins.description: Autonomous agent harness — 6 power commands, self-evolving skills, and invisible hooks that guard, polish, and reflect on every session.

plugins.name: transpile
plugins.description: Token-optimized document reader — silently compresses .md, .html, and .txt files on Read, cutting context usage by up to 40% with zero workflow change.
